abstract.para: A dataset containing all occurrences available in GBIF matching the query: { "and" : [ "TaxonKey is Crudia amazonica Spruce ex Benth.", "HasCoordinate is true" ] } The dataset includes records from the following constituent datasets. The full metadata for each constituent is also included in this archive: 29 records from Field Museum of Natural History (Botany) Seed Plant Collection 17 records from Herbarium - Instituto Nacional de Pesquisas da Amazônia (INPA) 2 records from Herbario Universidad de Antioquia (HUA) 5 records from K herbarium - Royal Botanic Gardens, Kew - Amostras Brasileiras Repatriadas - Herbário Virtual REFLORA 38 records from NY herbarium - The New York Botanical Garden - Amostras Brasileiras Repatriadas - Herbário Virtual REFLORA 1 records from Naturalis Biodiversity Center (NL) - Botany 1 records from ICN herbarium - Universidade Federal do Rio Grande Do Sul - Herbário Virtual REFLORA 4 records from Natural History Museum (London) Collection Specimens 2 records from Lund University Biological Museum - Botanical collection (LD) 2 records from Levantamento de Arbóreas do Parque Nacional do Jaú 3 records from IAC - Herbário do Instituto Agronômico de Campinas 1 records from EAC herbarium - Universidade Federal do Ceará - Herbário Virtual REFLORA 1 records from UEC - Herbário da Universidade Estadual de Campinas 9 records from Herbario Amazónico Colombiano 2 records from Natural History Museum, Vienna - Herbarium W 2 records from HUEFS herbarium - Universidade Estadual de Feira de Santana - Herbário Virtual REFLORA 20 records from IAN herbarium - Embrapa Amazônia Oriental - Herbário Virtual REFLORA 5 records from Royal Botanic Gardens, Kew - Herbarium Specimens 1 records from SPF herbarium - Universidade de são Paulo - Herbário Virtual REFLORA 9 records from NMNH Extant Specimen Records (USNM, US) 1 records from UPCB - Herbário do Departamento de Botânica 1 records from Compilación de datos de campo provenientes del levantamiento del Inventario Forestal Nacional (2015-2017), datos sin validar 1 records from Catálogo de Plantas das Unidades de Conservação do Brasil 1 records from CEN herbarium - Embrapa Recursos Genéticos e Biotecnologia - Herbário Virtual REFLORA 2 records from UNIP herbarium - Universidade Paulista - Herbário Virtual Reflora 1 records from HFSL - Herbário Dr. Ary Tupinambá Penna Pinheiro 1 records from EAFM - Herbário do Instituto Federal de Educação, Ciência e Tecnologia do Amazonas 2 records from Meise Botanic Garden Herbarium (BR) 1 records from SPF - Herbário da Universidade de São Paulo 4 records from Geneva Herbarium – General Collection (G) 2 records from Tropicos Specimens Non-MO 1 records from CEN - Herbário da Embrapa Recursos Genéticos e Biotecnologia 2 records from Base de Datos de Flora de la Cuenca del Río Orinoco en Colombia 14 records from Tropicos MO Specimen Data 2 records from HSTM herbarium - Universidade Federal do Oeste do Pará - Herbário Virtual REFLORA 6 records from Levantamientos de vegetación de la Amazonia Colombiana de 0.1 Ha 3 records from MBM herbarium - Museu Botânico Municipal \ Curitiba - Herbário Virtual REFLORA 2 records from CNMT - Herbário Centro Norte Mato Grossense 1 records from MFS - Herbário Profª. Drª. Marlene Freitas da Silva 1 records from EAC - Herbário Prisco Bezerra 13 records from RB - Rio de Janeiro Botanical Garden Herbarium Collection 4 records from MG herbarium - Museu Paraense Emílio Goeldi - Herbário Virtual REFLORA 40 records from The New York Botanical Garden Herbarium (NY) 8 records from Museu Paraense Emilio Goeldi Herbarium 1 records from Plantas del Alto Río Igará - Paraná, Amazonas - Proyecto Colombia BIO
